name: Green Bell Pepper Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems, seeds, and white portions of the peppers. Cut into pieces about an inch square.
2. Put half of the peppers and half the vinegar in a blender or food processor and puree. Repeat with remaining peppers and vinegar.
3. Transfer the puree to a large pan and add sugar, cayenne pepper, and salt.
4. Stir constantly until the mixture reaches a full rolling boil and add liquid pectin. Continue boiling for 1 minute, stirring frequently.
5. Remove from heat and stir in enough green food coloring to achieve the desired shade.
6. Pour immediately into sterilized jelly jars and seal with a thin layer of melted paraffin. Store in a cool, dry place.
